name: gpu-research-platform
description: Operate secure, cost-aware GPU research workloads on managed Kubernetes.

interface.shortDescription: Secure GPU platform operations for research teams.
interface.longDescription: Design and operate GPU tenancy, sharing, autoscaling, chargeback, GitOps, security baselines, and troubleshooting on managed Kubernetes.
defaultPrompt: Design a secure GPU research tenancy.
Review GPU utilization and cost controls.
